SELECT MACNumToString(num) AS mac_address FROM mac_addresses WHERE num % 2 = 0;
SELECT num, MACNumToString(num) AS mac_address FROM mac_addresses WHERE num >= 0 AND num <= 281474976710655;
CREATE TABLE additional_ids (id UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT a.num, MACNumToString(a.num) AS mac_address, b.id FROM mac_addresses a JOIN additional_ids b ON a.num % b.id = 0;
SELECT MACNumToString(num) AS mac_address FROM (SELECT num FROM mac_addresses WHERE num > 0) AS t1 UNION SELECT MACNumToString(0) AS mac_address;
WITH (SELECT max(num) FROM mac_addresses) AS max_num SELECT MACNumToString(max_num) AS max_mac_address FROM dual;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mac_addresses WHERE MACNumToString(num) LIKE '00:00:%';
